title: Brie Wrapped in Puff Pastry
ingredients: 1 sheet (1/2 box) frozen puff pastry sheet, thawed
Other toppings as desired (fig jam, sauteed peppers, cranberry sauce, nuts, etc.)
instructions: Mix egg and water and set aside.
Unfold pastry on lightly floured surface and roll into a 14-inch square.
Cut off the corners to make a circle.
Sprinkle parsley and/or other toppings on the top of the Brie cheese round.
Place Brie round in center of puff pastry circle.
Brush egg mixture on edges of the circle.
Fold the sides over the Brie round to make a circle and place seam side down on baking sheet.
Decorate top with pastry scraps if desired.
notes: Optional toppings include fig jam, sauteed peppers, cranberry sauce, or nuts
Pastry scraps can be used to decorate the top before baking
